title: abutilon otocarpum
intro: Abutilon otocarpum is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family, commonly known as the okra tree or Indian mallow. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Abutilon otocarpum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health issues.
